products.name: Starter
products.description: Three regional nodes, geo routing, replication every 30s, and grounded copilot for teams up to 10.

products.name: Pro
products.description: Priority replication, HTTP health probes, metrics history, and OpenAI copilot with citation tracking.

products.name: Enterprise
products.description: Global gateway, custom SLAs, audit logs, multi-key API access, and dedicated onboarding.

products.name: Extra region
products.description: Add a fourth regional SQLite node with full replication and routing integration.

products.name: Dedicated gateway
products.description: Single-tenant global gateway with custom domain and HA failover between regions.

products.name: Priority support
products.description: 15-minute response SLA, Slack channel, and quarterly architecture reviews.

knowledge.title: Getting started
knowledge.body: Create an API key in the console Settings panel. Open Overview and follow the getting started checklist — route a request, place an order, and ask the copilot. Replication syncs across us-east-1, eu-west-1, and ap-south-1.

knowledge.title: API authentication
knowledge.body: All /api/v1 endpoints except /health require the X-API-Key header when API_KEY is configured. Use API_KEYS for rotation. The gateway and regional backends share the same key in production deployments.

knowledge.title: Replication model
knowledge.body: GlobeCloud uses append-only replication logs per region. Product inserts, stock updates, orders, and knowledge docs replicate asynchronously. Conflict policy is last-write-wins on stock with a floor of zero.

knowledge.title: Geo routing
knowledge.body: GET /api/v1/route accepts client_lat and client_lon. The router probes regional /health endpoints in production mode or estimates latency locally. Circuit breakers mark unhealthy regions after repeated failures.

knowledge.title: Copilot grounding
knowledge.body: The agent retrieves knowledge snippets via TF-IDF before answering. Responses include citations with confidence scores. Set OPENAI_API_KEY for GPT-4o-mini; without it the system uses a local heuristic fallback.

knowledge.title: Support SLAs
knowledge.body: Starter: community support, 24-hour response target. Pro: email support, 8-hour response. Enterprise and Priority Support add-on: 15-minute response during business hours across all regions.

knowledge.title: Billing and plans
knowledge.body: Starter is $49/month for three regions. Pro is $199/month with metrics history and priority sync. Enterprise starts at $999/month with custom terms. Add-ons bill separately: extra region $29, dedicated gateway $99, priority support $149.

knowledge.title: Security practices
knowledge.body: Use REPLICATION_SECRET between regional peers. Never commit API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY to git. Rate limiting defaults to 120 requests per minute per IP. Audit logs retain the last 2000 API requests.

knowledge.title: Data residency
knowledge.body: EU customers can pin writes to eu-west-1. Reads may geo-route to the nearest healthy region. Replication to US and AP is asynchronous; configure sync intervals for compliance requirements.

knowledge.title: Rate limits and quotas
knowledge.body: Starter: 120 API requests per minute, 10 concurrent copilot sessions. Pro: 600 rpm, 50 sessions. Enterprise: custom limits. Order quantity is capped at 100 units per request.

knowledge.title: Changelog March 2026
knowledge.body: Added metrics history sampling, SSE live stream, order history API, catalog search, and premium brand refresh. Replication UI now shows replication_log_entries correctly.

knowledge.title: FAQ
knowledge.body: Q: What is GlobeCloud? A: A multi-region SQLite platform with geo routing, replication, and a RAG copilot. Q: Can I use my own catalog? A: Edit seed/catalog.json and run ./scripts/seed-production.sh.
